text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: …What? Why ya starin' at me like that?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Lemme guess, ye're holdin' back from 
commenting on how small I am.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! I couldn't care less, not one bit!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Size isn't just 'bout stature — it's about 
attitude. If ya set your mind to being big, 
you can be as big as ya want!
